Metadata.title: Sebastian Kolbusz | Freelance Frontend Engineer & SaaS Developer
Metadata.description: Senior Frontend Engineer specializing in high-performance SaaS products, Next.js, and immersive web experiences. Based in Zakopane, Poland.

hero.name: Sebastian Kolbusz
hero.tagline: Engineering high-performance web products that scale with your business.

bio.title: Sebastian Kolbusz
bio.description: Frontend architect with over 6 years of experience engineering scalable SaaS products and high-conversion digital assets.

experience.label: Years of Experience
experience.details: Specializing in React ecosystem, build performance, and developer experience.

location.details: Operating from the heart of the Tatra Mountains.

philosophy.title: Engineering Mindset
philosophy.details: I champion simplicity, performance, and pragmatic architecture. I build systems where predictable behavior and user trust are built into the code.
philosophy.craft_details: I treat engineering as a craft. It's not just about writing code; it's about creating digital environments that feel natural, responsive, and human.

projects.title: Featured Case Studies
projects.intro: I treat every line of code as a business investment. My focus is on creating robust, accessible, and high-performance systems that solve real-world challenges. From rapid MVP prototyping to optimizing enterprise-grade SaaS, I build digital experiences designed to last and perform.

zakofy.description: Premium booking engine for private Tatra mountain tours. Positioned the client as a market leader through superior SEO and a seamless UX.

your-krakow-travel.description: Unified discovery platform for Kraków's premier private tour provider. Centralized fragmented offerings into a high-conversion sales tool.

highlights.2: Structured data for Google rich results

wellezza.description: Digital storefront for an elite hair salon. Transformed local presence through seamless third-party booking integration.

billboard-zakopane.description: B2B platform for regional outdoor advertising leader. Streamlined the sales process with interactive location mapping.

services.title: Strategic Services
services.intro: Invest in Digital Assets, Not Just Code. I build systems designed to generate revenue, authority, and long-term trust.
services.limited_availability: * Accepting new projects for late Q1 2026

process.title: The Workflow
process.intro: A transparent, results-driven process designed for clarity and speed.
